docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-20-2007 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR FEB-20-2007 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-21-2007 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-06-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-21-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

WRONGFUL DISCHARGE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BORTOLI, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT ALBERA, JAMES ALBERA JR, JAMES ALBERA, JOSEPH MOORE, TED , INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS ALBERA BROS INC. SAN FRANCISCO CHRYSLER-JEEP, INC. ASSOCIATED THIRD PARTY ADMINISTRATORS AUTOMOTIVE INDUSTRIES WELFARE FUND AUTOMOTIVE INDUSTRIES JOINT TRUST FUNDS PENINSULA AUTOMOTIVE MACHINISTS LOCAL NO. 1414 DOES 1 THROUGH 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-06-2007 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-02-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-22-2007
AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. (212) PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: CARL SAUCEDA, CSR# 2031. (212)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
